channel.title: Context on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Context on jamesm.blog

item.title: Claude's Memory and Long Context in 2026: What Actually Works
item.description: A grounded look at how Claude's memory and long-context behaviour actually works in 2026 - what the million-token window really gives you, where prompt caching changes the economics, and how memory tools differ from context.
